name: Minimum Valid Packet
description: Smallest valid packet with empty payload
purpose: Boundary condition: verify CRC algorithm with minimal input

crc_coverage.description: CRC calculated over Header through Length (before payload)

packet_before_crc.description: Input bytes to CRC algorithm (bytes before CRC field)

crc_output.note: Values will be populated by firmware execution

expected_complete_packet.description: Full packet including CRC and footer (what will be transmitted)
expected_complete_packet.structure: Header(2) + Seq(1) + Cmd(1) + Len(2) + Payload(0) + CRC(2) + Footer(1)
expected_complete_packet.note: Byte 8-9 will contain CRC output, byte 8 will be footer 0xAA

verification.method: Execute firmware CRC16::Calculate() on packet_before_crc bytes
verification.procedure:
1. Run firmware test harness
2. Execute CRC16::Calculate([0x55, 0xAA, 0x01, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00], 6)
3. Capture the returned u16 value
4. Transmit complete packet (including CRC and footer 0xAA)
5. Capture transmitted bytes from serial/USB
6. Record actual crc_value and transmitted_crc_bytes
verification.notes: This is a TEMPLATE, not a canonical vector. Canonical status pending firmware execution.

interoperability.requirement: Every implementation must produce identical complete packet bytes
interoperability.note: Byte-for-byte match required, not just CRC values
